behavior_summary: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea: A simple cleanup handler triggered when an actor leaves the fast-area trigger; it clears a stored object reference using FREE::resetRef to avoid stale references.

U8P_STRATHAT::hatch: Orchestrates an egg-hatching sequence. It reads the egg type (Egg::getEggId) and branches: for eggId==0 it runs a multi-step sequence using spawn/suspend delays, checks item Z, sets item quality, places the avatar in stasis, moves or teleports NPCs, and may invoke Item::use; for eggId==1 it clears a stored FREE reference, calls the timing/gating helper (U8P_STRATHAT::func01D7), and may reset the egg id (Egg::setEggId) to 0 to re-initiate the other flow.

U8P_STRATHAT::func01D7: A gating/timing helper that checks a persistent gate (stratosTakenBreath). If the gate is not set it uses spawn/suspend delays and a local gate (local1) to eventually call the reaction handler (U8P_STRATHAT::func024A). Acts as a one-shot or queued invoker.

U8P_STRATHAT::func024A: The reaction that runs when the player takes a rock: it guards on avatarTookRock to avoid repeats, uses spawn/suspend delay helpers, sets avatarTookRock and hasBreath, plays music, emits a short bark line, and then restores music. Uses repeated short spawned timers to sequence audio and speech.
notable_control_flow: Branching on Egg::getEggId inside U8P_STRATHAT::hatch to choose between two distinct hatching sequences.
Frequent pattern of spawning an external helper process (spawn -> FREE::func1C19) and immediately suspending to implement short, non-blocking delays.

Gating via script/global flags: U8P_STRATHAT::func01D7 reads stratosTakenBreath to skip work if already done; U8P_STRATHAT::func024A reads/writes avatarTookRock and writes hasBreath to prevent repeat reactions.
Simple cleanup call in U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea performing FREE::resetRef(0x01, this).
open_questions: Exact semantics and parameters of the spawned helper FREE::func1C19 (appears to be a short timer/delay but its contract is not explicit).
Precise meaning of kernel reference 0x0203 that Kernel::resetRef modifies during the eggId==0 path (system-level state vs. sequence-specific flag).
Whether Egg::setEggId(0) in the eggId==1 branch permanently converts the object or just stages a second-phase U8P_STRATHAT::hatch; the persistence semantics are inferred but not certain.
Precise in-world targets of the NPC pathfind/teleport coordinates (map 0x70, x/y values) — inferred to position an NPC for the U8P_STRATHAT::hatch event but mapping to world content is unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea
main_function.purpose: Cleanup when an actor leaves the fast-area trigger: removes a stored/freeable reference to this object so it is no longer tracked by the FREE reference table.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine on area exit (U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea event) when the avatar or relevant actor leaves the object's fast-area trigger region.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: area-exit cleanup; frees stored object reference via FREE::resetRef

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::hatch
function_map.role: orchestrates egg-hatching sequences (branch on Egg::getEggId), handles spawning/delays, item quality, avatar stasis, NPC movement/teleport, and item use

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::func01D7
function_map.role: timing/gating helper for the 'breath' reaction; checks stratosTakenBreath and conditionally invokes the reaction handler (U8P_STRATHAT::func024A) after delays

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::func024A
function_map.role: executes the one-shot reaction when the player takes the rock: sets avatarTookRock and hasBreath, plays music, emits a bark, and sequences delays

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke the gating/timing helper when eggId==1 to coordinate a breath/reaction sequence before possibly converting the egg id.
Call the rock/breath reaction handler when the timing/gate conditions are satisfied (local gate or post-delay).

external_calls.purpose: Clear/free the stored reference id (0x01) for this object during area-exit cleanup.
Read the egg's type/id to decide which U8P_STRATHAT::hatch sequence to run (critical branch condition).
Reset or change an egg's id (used in the eggId==1 path to set id 0 and prepare a different sequence).
Spawned helper used as a short timer/delay at multiple points in the hatching sequence.
Reset a kernel-level reference/flag (0x0203) as part of the eggId==0 setup/cleanup.
Check the Z coordinate/height of the item before continuing the eggId==0 path.
Set the hatched item's quality/flags as part of completion of the eggId==0 sequence.
Put the avatar into stasis during the hatching choreography to control player movement/input.
Read an NPC's facing direction to configure spawned helper movement (passed into METHOD::func15E7).
Configure movement/orientation on a spawned helper object based on NPC direction and flags before a delay.
Request an NPC to pathfind to specific map coordinates (used with suspend to wait for completion) as part of the sequence.
Teleport an NPC to the target coordinates (immediate placement or fallback to pathfinding).
Invoke item usage as a process on the newly hatched item and suspend to capture result/effects.
Spawn a short delay helper and suspend to implement timing for the breath gating logic.
Use the spawned helper as a short timer for sequencing music and speech in the reaction.
Play an audio track to mark the start (0x73) and later restore music (0x61) around the bark/sequence.

reads.name: avatarTookRock
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the rock/breath reaction; read to gate whether U8P_STRATHAT::func024A should run.

reads.name: stratosTakenBreath
reads.likely_effect: A gating flag read by U8P_STRATHAT::func01D7 to skip the breath/timing sequence if already set.

writes.name: avatarTookRock
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the player takes the rock (in U8P_STRATHAT::func024A) to record the event and avoid replaying the reaction.

writes.name: hasBreath
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 alongside avatarTookRock to record/grant the 'breath' effect when the reaction occurs.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea: A simple cleanup handler triggered when an actor leaves the fast-area trigger; it clears a stored object reference using FREE::resetRef to avoid stale references.
